result.stdout:
Description:
  Gmail MCP Server - Dual-mode CLI and MCP integration for Gmail

Usage:
  GmailMcp [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  auth                                   Authenticate with Gmail using OAuth2
  search <query>                         Search Gmail messages using Gmail query syntax
  read <message-id>                      Read a specific Gmail message by ID
  download <message-id> <attachment-id>  Download an attachment from a Gmail message
  mcp                                    Start MCP server for AI assistant integration via stdio

Commands:
  auth                                   Authenticate with Gmail using OAuth2
  search <query>                         Search Gmail messages using Gmail query syntax
  read <message-id>                      Read a specific Gmail message by ID
  download <message-id> <attachment-id>  Download an attachment from a Gmail message
  mcp                                    Start MCP server for AI assistant integration via stdio

result.stdout:
Description:
  Download an attachment from a Gmail message

Usage:
  GmailMcp download <message-id> <attachment-id> [options]

Arguments:
  <message-id>     Unique identifier of the message containing the attachment
  <attachment-id>  Unique identifier of the attachment to download

Options:
  -o, --output <output>      Directory to save the file (default: current directory) []
  -f, --filename <filename>  Custom filename for the downloaded file []
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Download an attachment from a Gmail message

Usage:
  GmailMcp download <message-id> <attachment-id> [options]

Arguments:
  <message-id>     Unique identifier of the message containing the attachment
  <attachment-id>  Unique identifier of the attachment to download

Options:
  -o, --output <output>      Directory to save the file (default: current directory) []
  -f, --filename <filename>  Custom filename for the downloaded file []
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Read a specific Gmail message by ID

Usage:
  GmailMcp read <message-id> [options]

Arguments:
  <message-id>  Unique identifier of the message to read

Options:
  -r, --robot            Output as JSON for scripting [default: False]
  -f, --format <format>  Output format: text (plain text only), html (HTML only), or both (default) [default: both]
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

  -f, --format <format>  Output format: text (plain text only), html (HTML only), or both (default) [default: both]
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Search Gmail messages using Gmail query syntax

Usage:
  GmailMcp search <query> [options]

Arguments:
  <query>  Search query using Gmail syntax (e.g., 'from:user@example.com subject:invoice')

Options:
  -n, --max-results <max-results>  Maximum number of results to return [default: 10]
  -r, --robot                      Output as JSON for scripting [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help                   Show help and usage information
